name: Returning to Work After Bountiful Injury

mainEntity.name: Return to work after injury Bountiful restrictions?
mainEntity.text: Return to work after injury Bountiful restrictions?

acceptedAnswer.text: Light duty if available at same wages or TTD continues.[23]

suggestedAnswer.text: Bountiful employers offer modified work test restrictions; refuse unsafe duties. If wages drop partial benefits bridge gap. FMLA runs concurrent protects job 12 weeks.[23]

description: Light duty if available at same wages or TTD continues.[23]
